metadata.title: Velomac Flow Meter | Industrial Flow Measurement for Steam, Gas and Liquids
metadata.description: Velomac Flow Meter provides industrial flow measurement for steam, gas, liquid, chemical and water applications with manufacturer-direct support.

hero.label: Industrial Flow Measurement
hero.headline: Industrial Flow Measurement for Real Process Conditions
hero.subheadline: Steam, gas and liquid flow measurement matched to media, flow range and site conditions.

trustPoints.title: Manufacturer-Direct
trustPoints.text: Factory-close communication for product configuration and order details.

trustPoints.title: In-House Calibration
trustPoints.text: Flowmeters are checked before shipment to support stable field measurement.

trustPoints.title: Application-Based Selection
trustPoints.text: Model selection starts with media, flow range and process conditions.

siteConditions.title: Built Around Real Site Conditions
siteConditions.description: Flowmeter selection starts with the process. Media, flow range, pressure, temperature, pipe size and installation details shape the meter configuration.

image.alt: Industrial pipeline condition used for flowmeter selection

productsPreview.title: Flowmeters and Level Instruments
productsPreview.description: Core product families for steam, gas, liquid, chemical and water applications.

cardSummaries.vortex-flowmeter: For steam, gas and liquid process lines.
cardSummaries.electromagnetic-flowmeter: For conductive liquids, water and chemicals.
cardSummaries.thermal-mass-flowmeter: For compressed air and industrial gas.
cardSummaries.liquid-turbine-flowmeter: For clean liquids with stable flow.
cardSummaries.swirl-flowmeter: For gas and steam utility lines.
cardSummaries.balanced-differential-pressure-flowmeter: For process and duct flow measurement.
cardSummaries.ultrasonic-flowmeter: For pipe, open channel and utility metering.
cardSummaries.radar-level-transmitter: For non-contact tank and vessel level.
cardSummaries.magnetic-level-gauge: For local tank and vessel level indication.

applicationsPreview.title: Application-Based Selection
applicationsPreview.description: Start with the process condition, then match the meter type, materials and installation configuration.

whyVelomac.title: From Factory Floor to Field Reading

resourcesPreview.title: Selection Notes for Industrial Buyers
resourcesPreview.description: Article topics for selection and quotation work.

bottomCta.title: Send Site Details. Get a Better Recommendation.
bottomCta.text: Share the fluid, pipe size, flow range, pressure, temperature and application background. Velomac will review the conditions and suggest the next step.

image.alt: Industrial process line used as quotation support context
